name: Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped protein (beef, pork, chicken, shrimp, etc.)
1 cup assorted vegetables (peas, carrots, celery, mushrooms, bok choy, asparagus, etc., all cut into pea-sized pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the leftover rice sit uncovered to dry out overnight before using.
2. Heat a wok or heavy frying pan with 2-3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add crushed garlic and grated ginger, stirring until fragrant.
4. Add the chopped protein and stir-fry until browned.
5. Stir in the assorted vegetables and cook until tender-crisp.
6. Add the cooled rice to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until heated through.
7. If needed, add a bit more oil to prevent sticking.
8. In the last minute or so, add soy sauce and toss everything together.
9. Sprinkle with finely chopped green onion, remove from heat, and let stand covered for 1-2 minutes.
